comments.author: @YongLi_v5
comments.text:
China's experience demonstrated to Rwanda that rapid development is possible without first following a Western political template.
For Rwanda, China's greatest contribution was not only investment and infrastructure, but also providing a practical example of how a developing country can achieve modernization through strong governance, long-term planning, and a relentless focus on economic growth.
